title: ggml-org/llama.cpp GitHub Repository
permitted_uses: Local LLM feasibility planning for Apple Silicon development and offline demo mode.
claims_supported: llama.cpp is a C/C++ LLM inference project.
The repository describes Apple silicon as a first-class citizen and lists ARM NEON, Accelerate, and Metal optimizations.
The repository supports quantization options for reduced memory use.
claims_not_supported: That any particular medical model is clinically safe or license-compatible.
That local LLM inference on M4 Max can replace frontier cloud models without benchmarking.
